name: narrator-ai
description: AI video narration production toolkit — create film commentary videos with AI-generated scripts, dubbing, BGM, and visual templates. Supports 93 pre-built movies, 146 BGM tracks, 63 dubbing voices in 11 languages, and 90+ narration style templates.

plugins.name: narrator-ai-cli-skill
plugins.description: Teach your AI agent to create movie narration videos end-to-end. Say 'create a narration video for Pegasus' and the agent handles search, script generation, dubbing, BGM selection, video composing, and visual templates automatically.
